title: Guest user access setting not returned

evidence.reason: Tenant settings did not include AllowGuestUserToAccessSharedContent.

recommendation: Verify the signed-in user is a Fabric Administrator and re-run the tenant collector.

title: Workspaces with individual users (not groups) as admins
recommendation: Replace individual admin assignments with Entra security groups for lifecycle management.

title: Workspaces with >10 individual principals
recommendation: Consolidate broad access into Entra security groups; remove unused direct assignments.

title: Misconfigured datasource instances
recommendation: Repair gateway bindings, refresh expired OAuth credentials, or remove orphaned datasources.

title: Workspaces with external (guest) users
recommendation: Review external user assignments; remove when no longer required and route remaining guests through an Entra-managed security group with expiration.

title: Single-member gateway cluster(s) bound to data sources (SPOF)
recommendation: Add at least one secondary gateway member to every cluster carrying production data sources to remove the single point of failure.

title: No private-connectivity signal detected (VNet gateway / trusted-workspace access)
recommendation: If production datasources are reached over public endpoints, evaluate a Virtual Network data gateway, Fabric trusted-workspace access for ADLS / Storage, or private endpoints on the tenant.

title: Gateway cluster members are consistent and online
recommendation: Keep every member of a gateway cluster on the same, current monthly gateway release. Mismatched or outdated members cause inconsistent refresh behaviour and miss security fixes; replace offline members to preserve HA.

title: No personal-mode gateways with stored credentials
recommendation: Avoid personal-mode gateways for shared/production datasources - they pin connectivity and stored credentials to one user. Move sources onto an enterprise (on-prem/VNet) gateway and authenticate with managed identity or SSO instead of stored single-user credentials.
